violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink near the prep area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (large and small ice machines) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took machines out of service to be washed and sanitized and disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC informed to use 3 bay sink to sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

Inspector observed various grab & go food items with incomplete lists of ingredient (missing secondary ingredients) and missing or incorrect allergen info from their food processor. Packaged food must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC removed from grab and go fridge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The presence of rodents and small flies are not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings and live small flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat AND chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink AND dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
The ice machine is lacking an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The following was observed in poor repair. - floor near back door (missing tile) - countertops in small coffee room (peeling/chipping paint w/ exposed wood). - walk-in door gasket (broken gasket) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The floors in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of leaves. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
Handwashing sinks behind bar and restroom were lacking the proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
Boxes of oat milk were observed stored on the floor in the hallway. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium and chlorine sanitizing solutions for the 3 bay sink and dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
